{{CargoOrgan
|name=Mature Slugsire Horn
|type=Bionic
|rank=orange
|id=10687
|idx=45
|description=These seemingly soft, slick antennae are in fact lined with sharp barbs. A ghostly blue glow flickers across their surface, radiating an entrancing aura — like nature’s symphony luring prey into a beautiful death trap…
|skill=Transform into Slug Dragon King, dealing DMG equal to 181.6% of ATK, and increase next round's CRIT DMG by 42%!
|hp=2122
|def=149
|atk=163
|rush=321
|gene1=Against main species, CRIT +15%
|gene2=Per Divine Dragon Descent, {race} RUSH +10
Divine Dragon Descents: 20/20
|gene3=Fire DMG +90
|gene4=Per Divine Dragon Descent, {race} ATK +10
Divine Dragon Descents: 20/20
|gene5=Against main species, DMG +9%
|gene7=Against main species, DMG +9% (Awakened)
|}}
